philosophy.aria_support: Leverages WAI-ARIA to enhance support for assistive technologies.
philosophy.feedback_desc: Provides rapid and natural feedback for user operations, offering a comfortable "tangible" experience.
philosophy.focus_areas: We focus on the following points for design and development:
philosophy.kb_a11y: Supports keyboard operations so all users can use it.
philosophy.standard_overview_desc: For a high-level view of our design and implementation standards, please refer to the Standardization Overview.

internal.philosophy_desc: Guidelines for internal design consistency and encapsulation that should be followed when extending wimui or adding new components.
